extractor_judge_boundary.description: An LLM may be used as the claim extractor (prose to structured claim). The verifier's truth label (SUPPORTED | REFUTED | UNVERIFIABLE) must never invoke an LLM. This boundary is the PROVE/ViCrit non-circularity defense: the checker's correctness is grounded in a programmatic oracle over a measured signal, not any model's opinion.

proposition.description: Free-text source claim from the teacher's prose output.

dimension.description: Musical dimension the claim is about.

location.description: Bar-range [bar_start, bar_end] (inclusive) or 'whole_piece'. Beat granularity is not admissible. GATE 1 (v0.2): single-bar localization is INADMISSIBLE on real audio; bar-ranges are admissible only as DEGRADED region-level claims (width >= localization_granularity.min_region_bars), and whole_piece is the only RELIABLE tier. See localization_granularity.

polarity.description: +: signed anomaly in the positive direction. -: signed anomaly in the negative direction. neutral: asserts a virtue or absence-of-problem.

magnitude.description: Optional. When present, tightens the check. When null, falls back to sign+tolerance check.

localization_granularity.description: GATE 1 (#95) found bar-level localization FAILED on low-coverage Bach clips; the #100 refinement showed this is COVERAGE-DEPENDENT (clean bar localization 0.93-0.99 on high-coverage pathetique/moonlight vs ~0.55 on Bach). Admissibility of localized claims is therefore gated per-clip on alignment coverage (see coverage_gate). whole_piece is always admissible. The truth label never invokes an LLM.
localization_granularity.measured_on: 2 real Bach Invention clips (7zVlDxBO5q4, 2cbYFp9kNpg), construction-known corruption sweep {clean, tempo rush 1.3x/1.6x, dropout, noise SNR10}

headline_numbers.note: Even re-transcribing bit-identical audio (clean) loses ~13-20% of resolvable bars -- an AMT-nondeterminism + parangonar match-churn floor BELOW 90% before any corruption. Widening to region-level (W=2..16 bars) raised clean to ~0.86-1.0 over-resolvable but did NOT lift tempo/noise above ~0.6/0.33; out-of-anchor-span bars cap the resolvable pool.

whole_piece.rationale: No bar indexing; uses the full anchor span, always resolvable with >=2 anchors. The robust tier for all active dimensions and the dynamics dispersion / pedaling density / timing CV% checks. NOT subject to the coverage gate.

region.rationale: Bar-range claims are admissible only when the clip clears coverage_gate.threshold. On high-coverage clips (pathetique/moonlight ~0.99) clean localization is 0.93-0.99 within +/-1.0s; on low-coverage clips it is abstained (low_coverage). Tempo corruption remains the weakest mode (~0.58) even at high coverage -- region-level timing measures (percent deviation) tolerate window jitter.

single_bar.rationale: Replaces the v0.2 blanket ban (#100): per-bar localization is reliable on high-coverage clips (clean 0.93 within +/-0.1s on pathetique) but not on low-coverage clips. Gated by coverage_gate; abstains as low_coverage below threshold.

coverage_gate.enforced_in: LocationResolver(min_coverage=...), threaded from this value by the verify() orchestrator; whole_piece is exempt
coverage_gate.calibration: High-coverage clips pathetique (0.99) and moonlight (0.99) localize clean at 0.93-0.99 within +/-1.0s; low-coverage Bach (0.23-0.68) localizes at ~0.34-0.55. The 0.68->0.99 gap is unsampled, so 0.9 is a conservative provisional cut pending mid-coverage clips.

localization_granularity.abstention_mechanism: Two resolver guards return UNVERIFIABLE rather than mislocalizing: (1) out-of-anchor-span bars (np.interp would clamp to the last anchor); (2) the coverage gate (whole clip below coverage_gate.threshold). Both make the verifier SAFE-by-abstention.

timing.notes: Tolerance is a percent deviation from established_tempo over the region, NOT absolute onset-ms. This is robust to alignment jitter.

tolerance.name: on_fraction_deviation
tolerance.calibration_source: #101 G-B (AMT CC64 on-fraction, n=1202, partial-rho 0.478, ref=0.4623); provisional, locked pending front-4 anomaly calibration

pedaling.notes: Sustain-pedal TIME-on-fraction (fraction of duration CC64 is down) = the EXACT statistic validated vs PercePiano perceived pedaling at partial-rho 0.478 (n=1202, #101 G-B / gate2_expert_anchor.json measure pedal_frac). Replaces the previously-shipped pedal-BAR-fraction (fraction of bars with >=1 event), an unvalidated cousin. Units: time-on-fraction for BOTH location tiers (one tau). whole_piece reference = corpus-median AMT on-fraction (0.4623, controlled-gain piano-render calibration, #101 front-3); region reference = within-clip whole-piece on-fraction. minimum_events = 0 (deliberate): a genuinely dry/zero-pedal performance is an informative signed measurement (d = -reference => '-' under-pedal claim adjudicable), NOT an abstention. Coarse on/off only; half-pedal and flutter remain out of scope. Scope: controlled-gain audio. DIRECTIONAL SCOPE (#101 front-3 G-A, maximal-corruption n=30): under-pedal '-' PASSES (performance-flip 0.90, polarity-shuffle collapse +0.23, ordering 29/30); over-pedal '+' FAILS because AMT pedal on-fraction SATURATES (~0.55 ceiling -- full pedal, true frac=1.0, only reaches median d +0.214 < tau), so whole_piece '+' is marked substrate_insensitive_polarity and returns UNVERIFIABLE rather than a wrong REFUTED.

tolerance.name: velocity_deviation
tolerance.calibration_source: #101 G-B (AMT velocity, n=180, partial-rho 0.544, ref=51.5); provisional, locked pending front-4 anomaly calibration

dynamics.notes: Mean AMT note-velocity = perceived-loudness proxy, validated vs PercePiano perceived dynamics at partial-rho 0.544 (n=180, #101 G-B), gain-robust and onset-level. Replaces the perceptually-null, gain-bound librosa-RMS std/range statistic (partial-rho ~0.04). Units: MIDI velocity for BOTH location tiers (one tau). minimum_events = AMT notes. whole_piece reference = corpus-median AMT velocity (51.5, controlled-gain piano-render calibration); region reference = within-clip mean velocity. Scope: controlled-gain audio; AMT velocity calibration on heterogeneous real recordings is a separate G-F question.

articulation.rationale: AMT offsets are weaker than onsets (higher quantization error). Gate: offset_accuracy_validation must confirm offset reliability before this dimension is admissible. Region-level only; single-bar articulation claims are too fragile.

phrasing.rationale: Perceptual. The only available proxy is itself a perceptual model output, which reintroduces circularity.

interpretation.rationale: Definitionally subjective. No deterministic physical oracle exists.

timbre.rationale: No physical proxy. Timbre is a multi-dimensional perceptual construct with no single measurable correlate in the available signal chain.

dispatch_order: 2. If dimension.status == 'gated_on_measurement' and gate not validated -> UNVERIFIABLE(gated_dim)

2b. If claim.polarity == dimension.substrate_insensitive_polarity[location_tier] -> UNVERIFIABLE(substrate_insensitive_direction) [orchestrator, pre-router; e.g. pedaling whole_piece '+' -- AMT pedal saturation, #101 front-3]
3. If location is not resolvable (no score in catalog / piece not identified / span < alignment_uncertainty / bar score-time outside the matched anchor span) -> UNVERIFIABLE(unlocalizable)
4. If measurement substrate raised an error -> UNVERIFIABLE(substrate_failure)
5. If region has fewer than dimension.minimum_events -> UNVERIFIABLE(region_too_short)
6. Compute signed deviation d vs reference
8. If d confirms polarity direction beyond tau -> SUPPORTED
verdict_spec.span_vs_uncertainty_failsafe: Verifier must downgrade to UNVERIFIABLE(unlocalizable) when alignment_uncertainty >= location_span. location_span = bar_end - bar_start + 1 for bar-range; undefined (infinite) for whole_piece.
verdict_spec.note: UNVERIFIABLE claims are never folded into faithfulness or coverage. They are reported as a separate histogram by typed reason code.
